headline: Royal Caribbean (RCL) Stock May Be 27% Undervalued After Fuel Cost Guidance Cut
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises stock has delivered a very strong 5 year return, yet current valuation work suggests the shares still trade at a discount to an estimate of intrinsic value based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model and supporting multiple checks. Royal Caribbean Cruises has returned about 291.5% over the past 5 years, which puts the recent pullback over the last year into context as a pause after a very strong multi year run. Robust travel demand and pricing power can support the...
